name: Kanha - Morpankh Samraat
overview: ​In the humble village of Nandgaon, a miraculous 10-year-old cowherd named Kanha delights the villagers with his mischievous antics while using his divine powers to defend them against ferocious demons sent by his evil uncle, King Kans.

trailers.title: Kanha: Morpankh Samraat | Brand New Show | Sonic | Daily 10.30 am
